title: Duzzit Glass Wipes - Super Size (25% Bigger & Stronger) | Extra Strong Cleaning Wipes for Glass, Mirrors and More - Cleans and Shines (50 Jumbo Wipes)
features: SUPER SIZE FOR EXTRA POWER: These jumbo glass wipes are 25% bigger and stronger than regular wipes, making light work of large or awkward surfaces. Ideal for full-length windows, patio doors or wide mirrors that need more coverage in less time.

CLEANS & SHINES IN SECONDS: Each wipe is infused with a powerful formula that lifts dirt, smears and dust from glass. Leaves behind a streak-free shine that sparkles in the light—perfect for windows, mirrors, or even your car windscreen.

50 JUMBO WIPES PER PACK: With 50 large wipes in every resealable pack, these offer excellent value as part of your everyday cleaning supplies. Keep one in the kitchen, bathroom or car for convenient top-ups wherever they're needed.

EXTRA STRONG & DURABLE: Built to withstand scrubbing, these wipes don’t fall apart mid-clean. Whether polishing shower doors or wiping down glass coffee tables, they hold their shape and get the job done without tearing.

PERFECT FOR WINDOW CLEANING: Great for use as part of a complete window cleaning kit, these wipes remove sticky marks, fingerprints and grime in just a few swipes. Great for homes with pets or little ones constantly touching the glass.
IDEAL FOR CARS & VEHICLES: These also double as a quick and easy car glass cleaner. Use them on windscreens, side windows or interior mirrors to improve visibility and restore that showroom shine.
NO NEED FOR SPRAYS OR CLOTHS: Skip the bucket and sprays—these all-in-one wipes simplify your routine. Just pull one from the pack and clean. No mess, no streaks, no extra products required.
FRESH SCENTED FINISH: Each wipe leaves behind a light, fresh scent that subtly lifts the space. Ideal for sprucing up bathrooms or glass shelves without overpowering fragrances.
SAFE ON MULTIPLE SURFACES: Gentle enough to use on mirrored tiles, coffee tables, vases and shower screens -perfect for use as a bathroom cleaner or as part of a full home refresh.

HANDY, PORTABLE & READY TO GO: Whether at home or on the move, these wipes are a space-saving solution in any window cleaner toolkit. Great for keeping in the car, under the sink or in a cleaning caddy for quick jobs.
description: Product Description Keep glass gleaming with Duzzit Glass Wipes – the must-have addition to any window cleaning kit. Designed to make cleaning fast and fuss-free, these jumbo wipes are 25% bigger and stronger than standard wipes, offering extra coverage and strength with every use. Ideal for windows, mirrors, shower screens, and glass tables, they lift dirt, smudges, and greasy marks with ease. Whether tackling everyday mess or refreshing your bathroom, these wipes deliver a crystal-clear shine without streaks. The resealable pack keeps each wipe fresh and ready to use, so you're always prepared. Perfect for quick cleans or as a staple in your regular routine, these wipes are an essential part of your glass cleaner and bathroom cleaner collection. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Perfume, Limonene, Methylisothiazolinone, Benzisothiazolinone.
